review_notes: → 교훈: Entering a trade without a clear thesis leads to random results.
→ 개선: Always establish a thesis grounded in price/technical analysis before opening a position.
→ 교훈: Trading without a clear thesis results in no actionable edge and zero P/L.
→ 개선: Establish a concrete thesis with predefined entry and exit criteria before considering any position.
→ 교훈: Trading without a clear thesis yields no edge and wastes opportunity.
→ 개선: Establish a thesis grounded in price/technical analysis before entering any options trade.
